candidate_definition_hints.text: NAT type diagnosis CLI. Tells you why WebRTC/P2P/VPN connections fail and whether TURN is required.
NAT type diagnosis CLI. One command tells you why your WebRTC, P2P, or VPN connections struggle — and whether TURN is required.
